This article on a location in the [Province of Como](/wiki/Province_of_Como "Province of Como") is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Drezzo&action=edit).

[newspapers](https://www.google.com/search?&q=%22Drezzo%22&tbs=bkt:s&tbm=bks) **·** [books](https://www.google.com/search?tbs=bks:1&q=%22Drezzo%22+-wikipedia) **·** [scholar](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=%22Drezzo%22) **·** [JSTOR](https://www.jstor.org/action/doBasicSearch?Query=%22Drezzo%22&acc=on&wc=on) *(December 2025)* *([Learn how and when to remove this message](/wiki/Help:Maintenance_template_removal "Help:Maintenance template removal"))* |

is a *[frazione](/wiki/Frazione "Frazione")* of the *[comune](/wiki/Comune "Comune")* of [Colverde](/wiki/Colverde "Colverde"), located in the [Province of Como](/wiki/Province_of_Como "Province of Como") in the [Lombardy](/wiki/Lombardy "Lombardy") region of Italy. It lies approximately 40 kilometres (25 mi) northwest of [Milan](/wiki/Milan "Milan") and about 6 kilometres (4 mi) west of [Como](/wiki/Como "Como"), near the Swiss border. Formerly an independent *comune*, Drezzo was incorporated into Colverde in 2014.

**Drezzo** is a *[frazione](/wiki/Frazione "Frazione")* of the *[comune](/wiki/Comune "Comune")* of [Colverde](/wiki/Colverde "Colverde"), located in the [Province of Como](/wiki/Province_of_Como "Province of Como") in the [Lombardy](/wiki/Lombardy "Lombardy") region of Italy. It lies approximately 40 kilometres (25 mi) northwest of [Milan](/wiki/Milan "Milan") and about 6 kilometres (4 mi) west of [Como](/wiki/Como "Como"), near the Swiss border. Formerly an independent *comune*, Drezzo was incorporated into Colverde in 2014.
